query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A single-story wooden house with moss-covered roofing and missing exterior panels stands among leafless trees in a wooded area. Vines and shrubs grow along the walls and foreground, while fallen leaves cover the sloped ground. A small corrugated metal structure is visible to the left, and yellow flowers grow in the grass near the house.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A severely decayed wooden house stands amid bare trees, its structure degraded by a partially collapsed moss-covered roof, missing wall panels, and invasive vines. Broken boards, scattered debris, and a caved-in porch expose the interior framing, communicating entropy and profound neglect. Fallen leaves and aggressive undergrowth surround the crumbling building, emphasizing the passage of time and nature's reclamation of the abandoned shelter.
